steps.title: Find the probability of room C
steps.content:
Since the probabilities of all mutually exclusive outcomes sum to 1:

$$0.64 + 0.32 + P(C) = 1$$
$$P(C) = 1 - 0.96 = 0.04$$

steps.title: Convert probability to visitor count
steps.content:
Multiply the probability by the total number of visitors:

$$0.04 \times 375 = \frac{4}{100} \times 375 = \frac{4 \times 375}{100} = \frac{1500}{100} = 15$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
